_comment: Single source of truth mapping abstract widget events to expected NVDA spoken phrases. Phrases are matched case-insensitively as substrings of the most recent NVDA spoken-phrase log entries. Update this file whenever NVDA cadence or component markup changes; specs reading from srAssert.expectAnnouncedEvent() will pick up the new value automatically.
_versioning: Bump _meta.nvdaVersion when these phrases were last validated against a specific NVDA build. Older NVDA versions may produce different cadence; CI pins to _meta.nvdaVersion via tools/accessibility/setupNvda.ps1.
